evals.prompt: Break down this spec into implementation tasks: /Users/martinhj/Desktop/time-tracker-spec.md — This is a greenfield project, no existing code. I'll be the sole developer working on it. No Asana project exists yet. No Figma designs (and none needed — spec says to use Tailwind defaults).
evals.expected_output: A markdown file at docs/task-breakdowns/ with milestones delivering usable increments (not layer-by-layer), tasks separated by platform (Backend/Frontend), proper ordering (foundational entities first, read before write, backend before frontend), explicit dependencies via T-labels, and a References section pointing back to the spec file.
